tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The laboratory results show good kidney and electrolyte function, and a favorable lipid profile. However, the HbA1c is elevated (6.4%), indicating impaired glucose metabolism consistent with prediabetes or early diabetes. Glucose is currently normal. Recommend clinical follow-up for glycemic control and diabetes risk management.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Civico Renzetti Lanciano
